plugins.name: limena-audit
plugins.description: Audit any web URL for WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility via limena's hosted platform. Conversational flow walks 'which client → which program → which URLs → audit'. Pairs axe-core with an LLM heuristic engine for ~96% WCAG 2.2 AA coverage. Use when the user wants accessibility audits, WCAG compliance, or AODA / ADA / Section 508 / EN 301 549 reporting.
